_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: Aether Tickets
author: aether@example.com
description: Aether Tickets — Discord ticket bot with Flask web UI. Runs both the Discord bot and the web dashboard concurrently. Set LAUNCH_MODE=bot to run the bot only.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y git python3-pip

cd /mnt/server

if [ -d .git ]; then
  git pull
else
  if [ -n "${GIT_REPO}" ]; then
    git clone "${GIT_REPO}" .
  fi
fi

pip install -U pip
pip install -U -r requirements.txt

variables.name: Discord Bot Token
variables.description: Your Discord bot token from the Discord Developer Portal.

variables.name: Discord Client ID
variables.description: OAuth2 Client ID from the Discord Developer Portal (required for the web UI).

variables.name: Discord Client Secret
variables.description: OAuth2 Client Secret from the Discord Developer Portal (required for the web UI).

variables.name: Flask Secret Key
variables.description: Random secret key for Flask session management. Generate with: python -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))"

variables.name: Discord OAuth Redirect URI
variables.description: The full callback URL for Discord OAuth. Must match your Discord app settings. Example: https://tickets.yourdomain.com/auth/callback

variables.name: Launch Mode
variables.description: What to launch: 'both' (bot + web UI), 'bot' (Discord bot only), or 'web' (Flask web UI only).

variables.name: Flask Environment
variables.description: Set to 'production' for normal use, 'development' for debug mode.

variables.name: Guild ID
variables.description: Optional: Discord server ID for faster command syncing. Leave blank for global sync.

variables.name: Database Path
variables.description: Path to the SQLite database file. Default is tickets.db in /home/container.

variables.name: Git Repository URL
variables.description: Optional: Git repository URL to clone/pull on install. Leave blank to upload files manually.
